brief: Geopolitical tensions and technology disruptions dominate today's news, from US-Iran strikes and a Telstra system failure in Australia to AI's impact on work and cognition. Research papers explore AI in gaming, education, and weather forecasting, highlighting innovation and caution.
news_summary: Escalating US-Iran strikes in the Strait of Hormuz raise oil prices and shipping risks, while a Telstra outage in Australia exposes infrastructure vulnerabilities. AI automation concerns emerge as dock workers demand shorter hours, and a report warns that instant AI answers may reduce critical thinking.
papers_summary: New papers present AlayaWorld for generating playable game worlds, a prompt-coach AI for teaching prompt engineering, and GeoXplain for interactive weather model explanations, alongside studies on perceived system predictability and AI agents in open-source software.
